name: Hormuz Strait
notes: Commercial shipping crisis; vessel transit effectively suspended
alternative: Overland via Turkey or airlift via UNHAS

name: Beirut Port
notes: Operating at reduced capacity due to conflict damage
alternative: Tripoli port or overland from Jordan

name: Bandar Abbas Port
notes: Major Iranian port; access disrupted by Hormuz crisis

name: Port Sudan
notes: Critical for Sudan humanitarian corridor; congestion reported
alternative: Airlift via UNHAS from Nairobi/Addis Ababa

name: Bab al-Hawa Crossing
notes: Primary cross-border aid route into NW Syria; mandate renewed

name: Rafah Crossing
notes: Closed since May 2024; no humanitarian access via this route
